claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T005_S035_PRE_01 ("And summaries of these historical attempts can also be useful to guide future...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T009_S002_BLO_01 ("We can't fund every startup yet, but we can hopefully make this advice very g...").
